eligibility.work_rights: Australian or New Zealand citizens or permanent residents at the time of application can apply.

notes: No official direct apply URL found on the graduate program page; it only provides a 'Register your interest' link (pushapply) and states application dates. The pushapply page could not be opened via the web tool due to safety/URL constraints, so direct_apply_url is set to null.
Eligibility graduation window (e.g., specific graduating years) is not explicitly stated; only 'completed a bachelor’s degree before starting the program' is stated.
Eligibility disciplines are not explicitly listed as an allowed/required set (the page lists streams, not eligible degree disciplines), so eligibility.disciplines is empty.
